# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security


stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  CI_REGISTRY: $CI_REGISTRY
  CI_REGISTRY_USER: $CI_REGISTRY_USER
  CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD: $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
  - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
  - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
  - ssh-keyscan $SSH_HOST >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/known_hosts

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running custom build script from repository"
    - chmod +x ./scripts/build.sh
    - ./scripts/build.sh
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  except:
    - tags

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running custom test script from repository"
    - chmod +x ./scripts/test.sh
    - ./scripts/test.sh
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  except:
    - tags

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running custom deploy script from repository"
    - chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
    - ./scripts/deploy.sh
  only:
    - main
  except:
    - tags

security:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running security checks"
    - chmod +x ./scripts/security-check.sh
    - ./scripts/security-check.sh
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  except:
    - tags

include:
  - local: .gitlab-ci.yml
  - project: 'group/templates'
    file: 'build-template.yml'
    ref: 'main'

cache:
  paths:
    - node_modules/
    - vendor/
  key: $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "staging"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "production"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "feature/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "hotfix/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "release/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "support/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "test/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "dev/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "uat/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "qa/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "integration/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "staging/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "production/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "release/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "hotfix/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "feature/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "test/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "dev/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "uat/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "qa/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "integration/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "staging/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "production/*"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "staging/*"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "uat/*"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "qa/*"
